# SnappyWorks Gardening

> Professional gardening and outdoor maintenance services in Geelong, Victoria, Australia.

## Services
- Mowing
- Weeding
- Edging
- Pressure Cleaning
- Hedge Trimming
- Garden Tidy
- Mulching & Landscaping
- Rubbish Removal

## Service Areas
Geelong and surrounding suburbs including Geelong CBD, Newtown, Highton, Belmont, Grovedale, Waurn Ponds, North Geelong, Norlane, Torquay, Lara, Corio, Leopold, Armstrong Creek, and Mount Duneed.

## Contact
- Phone: 0438 539 044

- Hours: Mon-Sat 7am-6pm

## About
Locally owned and operated gardening business serving Geelong since 2024. We offer reliable, quality gardening services for residential and commercial properties with fair, upfront pricing, a 100% satisfaction guarantee, and same-day quoting.
